title: Fix wait() hang when interface has always @* with process calls and VIF function access

features.name: interface initial block with wait on internal variable
features.description: Code should include an interface with an initial block that contains a wait() statement waiting on a variable defined within the interface

features.name: interface always @* block with process::self call
features.description: Code should include an interface with a combinational always @* block that calls process::self() to get the current process handle

features.name: virtual interface function writing to interface member variable
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member where a task calls a function through the virtual interface that writes to an interface member variable

features.name: interface function writing to interface variable
features.description: Code should include an interface function that writes to a member variable of the same interface

features.name: wait on variable driven via VIF function call in interface with combo block
features.description: Code should include an interface with both an always @* block using process::self and an initial block with wait(), where the waited variable is written through a virtual interface function call from a class
